name: undo_grouping_smoke
description: Verify that begin_undo_group + N mutations + end_undo_group + undo() rolls back ALL mutations in one step. Catches regressions in undo group plumbing.

args.script:
import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['UndoSeed', 'UndoNew1', 'UndoNew2', 'UndoNew3']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
seed = c4d.BaseObject(c4d.Ocube)
seed.SetName('UndoSeed')
doc.InsertObject(seed)
c4d.EventAdd()
print('seed cube placed')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for name in ['UndoNew1', 'UndoNew2', 'UndoNew3']:
    sg = c4d.BaseObject(c4d.Osphere)
    sg.SetName(name)
    doc.AddUndo(c4d.UNDOTYPE_NEW, sg)
    doc.InsertObject(sg)
c4d.EventAdd()
print('added 3 spheres inside undo group')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['UndoSeed', 'UndoNew1', 'UndoNew2', 'UndoNew3']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('teardown ok')
